1.t: I ___ a student. My name is Carlos.
She ___ from Venezuela. She is from Caracas.
___ your name?

I ___ like coffee. I prefer tea.
___ she speak English?
He ___ to work every day by bus.
There ___ a supermarket near my house.
I have ___ brothers. Just one sister.
___ time do you start work?

We ___ a film last Saturday.
___ they go to school yesterday?
He ___ at home last night. He went out.
I was born ___ 1998.
My apartment is ___ the third floor.
There are ___ books on the table — about ten.

I ___ like vegetables when I was young.

___ are you doing this weekend?

You ___ wear a jacket. It is very cold outside.

2.t: My sister ___ a doctor. She works at a hospital.
___ are you from? I am from Maracaibo.
We ___ at school right now.
___ your parents work in an office?

___ you at the party last night?

___ they travel abroad when they were students?

___ many students in your class?

___ she have a bicycle?

___ did you buy that jacket? It is beautiful.

___ a lot of noise outside. What is happening?
